overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting vibrant yellow and cyan neon lights, towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles traversing multi-lane roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street intersection with towering billboards

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in digital billboards
camera tilts back down to street level focusing on the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner looking up at the towering neon-lit buildings and surrounding architecture

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated MARQUEE signage in gold letters
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
rain-slicked road surface reflecting neon lights
towering buildings covered with large digital advertisements and neon signage
vertical yellow neon light strips running along building edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a ground-level view of a cyberpunk intersection, then the camera tilts up to reveal massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards against the night sky. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lighting. The character stands at the crosswalk observing the towering architecture before the camera returns to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and palm tree planters

events.description: futuristic black sedan drives past on the multi-lane road
character begins walking forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing traffic and surroundings, then begins walking

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving past the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: raised planter containing palm trees on the sidewalk corner
bright linear fluorescent lights suspended over the street

segments.scene_description: The character stands at the intersection crosswalk as futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet roads. Palm trees in planters line the sidewalk. After observing the traffic, the character begins walking forward along the sidewalk beneath overhead street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures

events.description: passing pedestrians walking in opposing direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk beneath neon-lit overpasses and elevated structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding an umbrella walking toward the camera
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark metallic building facade with illuminated windows running along the sidewalk
cyan and red neon business signs across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures, passing other pedestrians including one with an umbrella. The dark building wall runs along the left side while neon signs glow across the multi-lane street to the right. Overhead linear lights illuminate the wet concrete path.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk adjacent to biophilic glass building with vertical gardens

events.description: approaching modern glass building with hanging vegetation and reflective surfaces
approaching intersection with blue sports car and red sedan crossing

agents.ego_description: walking past the reflective glass facade of a building covered in hanging plants, then approaching a crosswalk with traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving through the intersection
red sedan crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: modern building with transparent glass walls and gold structural elements
dense hanging plants and vines visible through the glass facade
yellow striped crosswalk markings at the approaching intersection

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a striking glass building featuring a vertical garden with hanging plants visible through the transparent facade. The camera captures reflections in the glass as the character approaches another intersection. A blue sports car and red sedan drive through the crossroads as the character nears the crosswalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district, transitioning from a wide architectural perspective to an intimate walk along a futuristic street. It begins at a ground-level intersection where the camera tilts upward to reveal massive skyscrapers and digital billboards reflecting off wet asphalt before returning to the character at the crosswalk. As futuristic vehicles stream past palm trees in planters, the camera follows the character moving forward beneath overhead street lighting. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment as the character walks along a covered sidewalk under elevated highway structures, passing pedestrians and glowing neon signs. Finally, the path opens up alongside a glass building featuring a vertical garden, with the camera capturing reflections in the facade before approaching a crossroads where a blue sports car and red sedan drive past.
